chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-648 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.2681/2026. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.2682/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 14.04.2026 Petitioner Zulfiqar Ali Shah in person. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. This is the second petition by same petitioner with same prayer. The first petition viz. C.P. No.D-647/2026 has just been dismissed by us. Therefore, this petition is dismissed as not maintainable. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
